portability_tests.description: Imported canonical state survives removal of the capture component and remains transferable and recoverable.
A fresh process retrieves and generically exports the imported conversation without the IMP-056 capture component or preferred interface.
One local Ollama session is captured, imported with provenance and relationship metadata, exported generically, transferred, restored, and inspected after capture removal.

limitations: Synthetic CI uses an injected transport and is not real Ollama evidence.
Primary Intel Mac evidence is accepted for the exact merged IMP-057 implementation commit and stored as a privacy-reviewed result.
The bounded drill completes PORT-001, PORT-003, and the IMP-057 portion of PORT-013 for explicit non-streaming text capture and parent relationships.
Native Ollama history discovery, attachments, multimodal content, tools, streaming capture, and target-specific export remain outside this evidence.
The alternate component is a fresh-process canonical-state reader and generic exporter; no second model or runtime adapter is claimed.
ChatGPT migration, PORT-015, the complete Phase 6 gate, general application replacement, and a stable general anti-lock-in claim remain outside this implementation.

context_replay_extension.description: Explicitly selected imported canonical text events are resolved through accepted source mappings, materialized as data-only untrusted context, and replayed through a distinct approved target runtime path.
limitations: Synthetic CI uses an injected Ollama transport and is not real local-runtime evidence.
The real-machine drill uses a deterministic non-private synthetic ChatGPT-format source and one explicitly selected already-installed local Ollama model.
The report omits model names, source identifiers, prompts, responses, paths, usernames, hostnames, credentials, and secret values.
Native application history discovery, automatic retrieval, attachments, multimodal content, tools, target-specific export, and provider round-trip fidelity remain outside this extension.
The complete Phase 6 gate and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
